title: main.tsx
content:
This file serves as the entry point for the React application. It sets up the strict mode and renders the root `App` component into the DOM.

### Purpose

- Initializes the React application.
- Wraps the main application component in `StrictMode` for development-time checks.
- Mounts the `App` component to the HTML element with the ID 'root'.

### Key Exports/Functions

- `createRoot`: From `react-dom/client`, this function is used to create a root for the React application.

### Usage Example

This file is typically not modified after initial project setup. It's responsible for the initial rendering of the entire application.

```typescript
// No direct usage example for this file as it's the application's bootstrap.
// The App.tsx file would contain the main application structure.
```
